ucdxml:block.title: Jurchen data
ucdxml:block.edit:
code-point-attributes &= attribute kJURC_NCReading { xsd:string { pattern='[^\t"]+' } }?
code-point-attributes &= attribute kJURC_Numeric { xsd:string { pattern="[1-9]\d{0,4}" } }?
code-point-attributes &= attribute kJURC_RSUnicode { xsd:string { pattern="[1-9]\d{0,1}\.[1-9]\d{0,1}" } }?
code-point-attributes &= attribute kJURC_Src { xsd:string { pattern="NC:\d{3}\.\d{2}(,\d{3}\.\d{2})?|SJ-B:\d{3}[A-Z]\.\d|JJ:\d{3}|N5131:X-\d{4}" } }?
